01 — About

Wholesaler by day, Nasdaq trader by morning, creator by passion.

I'm a 21-year-old entrepreneur balancing multiple worlds — running an electronics wholesale business while actively trading Nasdaq futures during the New York AM session. I create content around my journey, business, fitness, and lifestyle, with a focus on sharing real experiences and free value. I'm constantly exploring new skills, building connections, and pushing myself to grow in every area of life.
